name: Color Madness
short_description: Color Madness is a side-view game where the player controls a cube that loses its eyesight when moving
detailed_description:
A little man suffers from a rare cubic disease that takes away his eyesight while moving, now he is trying to return home, but a terrible disaster and an aggressive environment prevent him, will he be able to return back?

Color Madness is a side-view game where the player controls a cube that loses its eyesight when moving and moves from memory, dodging traps and overcoming various obstacles, jumping on platforms and avoiding collisions with dangerous cubes.

Control:

WASD - moving

Game Features:

  • Visual style

  • Multiple locations

  • High Difficulty
